replication_unit: zone (cross-zone clustered); per-zone offset CIs descriptive only
decomposition: throttle = throttle-blind (same-budget cap efficiency) + carbon-signal value
fair_gap_definition: throttle vs GREEN-offline pause on identical oracle windows at reallocated idle (pure mechanism)
policies: GREEN pause: {online, offline/forecast} x {dedicated 26W, reallocated 0W} idle

cross_zone_real_only.carbon_latency_pareto_note: throttle ~+9% carbon at +2.4 h; GREEN at its carbon-max budget can exceed throttle on carbon but only by deferring more work (large makespan). The two are points on a carbon-vs-latency Pareto; throttle is the low-latency point.

mechanism_gap_split.note: net fair gap is a cancellation; the carbon-winning mechanism is zone-dependent
